meta.title: FAQ | Frequently Asked Questions | DECA Windows & Doors
meta.description: Answers to common questions about DECA European-style windows and doors — pricing, installation, warranty, energy efficiency, and more.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Everything you need to know about DECA European-style windows and doors. Can't find your answer? Contact us — we're happy to help.

items.q: What types of windows does DECA manufacture?
items.a: DECA manufactures tilt-turn windows, casement windows, fixed windows, sliding doors, and entry doors. All products use European-engineered profile systems from GEALAN (uPVC) and ALUMIL (aluminum) with multi-chamber thermal insulation.

A tilt-turn window is a European-style window that operates in two modes: it tilts inward from the top for ventilation, and turns (swings) fully inward for easy cleaning and maximum airflow. It's the most popular window type in Europe and offers superior air-tightness and security compared to traditional American windows.

items.q: What profile systems do you use?
items.a: We use GEALAN-LINEAR and GEALAN-KUBUS uPVC profile systems (German-engineered, up to 7 chambers) and ALUMIL aluminum profiles. All profiles exceed U.S. energy codes and are available in 200+ RAL colors.

Yes. We offer double and triple-pane insulated glass units with argon or krypton gas fill, low-E coatings, and warm-edge spacers. Triple glazing provides U-values as low as 0.15 BTU/(h·ft²·°F) for exceptional energy performance.

items.q: Can I get custom sizes and shapes?
items.a: Absolutely. Every DECA product is custom-manufactured to your exact specifications at our facility in Westfield, MA. We produce arched, round, trapezoidal, and other non-standard shapes.

items.q: How much do DECA windows cost?
items.a: Pricing depends on size, profile system, glazing, hardware, and finish. We provide free, no-obligation quotes. Contact us or use our online quote form to receive a detailed estimate for your project.

items.q: Do you offer volume pricing for contractors?
items.a: Yes. We offer quantity-based discounts for contractors, builders, and dealers. Larger orders receive better pricing. Visit our For Professionals page or contact our B2B team for details.
Standard production time is approximately 4 weeks from order confirmation. Rush orders may be available — please contact us to discuss your timeline.

Yes. DECA offers professional installation by our certified team throughout the Northeast. We also provide detailed installation guidelines for contractors and builders who prefer to install independently.

We manufacture in Westfield, MA and deliver throughout the Northeast United States — Massachusetts, Connecticut, New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, New Hampshire, Vermont, and Maine. Contact us for delivery to other regions.

items.q: Can I install DECA windows myself?
items.a: While our windows can be installed by experienced professionals, we recommend installation by DECA-certified installers to ensure optimal performance and full warranty coverage.

items.q: Are DECA windows ENERGY STAR certified?
items.a: Yes. Our windows meet or exceed ENERGY STAR requirements for all U.S. climate zones. Many of our configurations exceed code requirements by up to 300%.

items.q: What certifications do your products have?
items.a: Our products are NFRC certified for independently verified performance ratings, ENERGY STAR qualified, and eligible for LEED project credits. We provide full certification documentation with every order.

items.q: Will new windows lower my energy bills?
items.a: High-performance windows significantly reduce heat loss in winter and heat gain in summer. Homeowners typically see meaningful reductions in heating and cooling costs, especially when replacing older single-pane or aluminum-frame windows.

DECA products come with a 15-year transferable warranty covering manufacturing defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty is transferable to subsequent homeowners, adding value to your property.

items.q: How do I file a warranty claim?
items.a: Contact us by phone at (413) 771-4457 or email info@decawindows.com with your order details and description of the issue. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
Yes. Our team provides ongoing support including adjustment, maintenance guidance, and replacement parts. We stand behind every product we manufacture.

ctaSection.title: Still Have Questions?
ctaSection.description: Our team is ready to help. Get a free consultation and quote for your project.
